creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Python is not a problem, actually. The main problem is to build libopenshot [1] and libopenshot-audio [2] on FreeBSD - they have many linux-specific things, so I wasn't able to accomplish that. And without porting these two, we can't update OpenShot port to 2.2.0 

[1] https://github.com/OpenShot/libopenshot
[2] https://github.com/OpenShot/libopenshot-audio
